headline: US CBDC Ban Takes Effect Amid $1.7T Bill

article.title: US CBDC ban to go into effect without Trump signoff on housing bill
article.summary: Donald Trump confirmed on social media that he would not sign the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes a ban on a US CBDC until the end of 2030, setting the stage for the bill to become law on Saturday.

headline: $100M Bitcoin Bond Plan Rejected in New Hampshire

article.title: New Hampshire council votes down $100M Bitcoin bonds
article.summary: State representative Keith Ammon said the New Hampshire executive council's vote against Bitcoin-backed bonds was “short-sighted,” urging the body to reconsider the measure.

headline: SK Hynix Surges 13% on $26.5B US Offering

article.title: SK Hynix Climbs 13% After Record $26.5 Billion US Offering
article.summary: SK Hynix Inc. delivered a 13% gain in its debut trading day on a US exchange, after breaking the record for the biggest first-time share sale by a foreign company.

headline: S&P 500 Gains 0.5% Ahead of Earnings Season

article.title: S&P 500 Rises Before Earnings as SK Hynix Debuts: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks higher in the countdown to the earnings season, with SK Hynix Inc. jumping in its debut and the market parsing the latest geopolitical developments.

headline: Circle Gains OCC Nod for $1B Trust Bank

article.title: Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
Circle won final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, allowing it to place USDC reserves under federal oversight and expanding its regulated digital asset custody business.

headline: Bitcoin-Backed Credit Launches in Japan via Metaplanet Partnership

article.title: Metaplanet Announces Joint Study to Bring Bitcoin-Backed Digital Credit to Japan
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Metaplanet Announces Joint Study to Bring Bitcoin-Backed Digital Credit to Japan
Metaplanet is taking its Bitcoin strategy beyond treasury accumulation, launching a study to explore tokenized, Bitcoin-backed credit products that could reshape Japan's debt market.

article.title: Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Dumps Nearly Half of BTC Holdings for $87 Million
article.summary: Nasdaq-listed Empery Digital said it sold 1,400 Bitcoin since May to help fuel an AI data center deal, legal bills, and other expenses.

headline: Fed Taps Xbox CEO Amid 3200 Job Cuts

article.title: Xbox CEO Joins Fed AI Jobs Task Force Days After Announcing 3,200 Layoffs
article.summary: Asha Sharma will advise the Federal Reserve on AI’s impact on jobs and productivity as Xbox undergoes the biggest restructuring in its history.
